title: Chicken Biryani
description: A classic Italian-inspired biryani dish made with marinated chicken and flavorful basmati rice.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the tomato sauce, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
Stir to combine and bring to a simmer.
Add the sweet rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken and sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Fluff the biryani with a fork and serve hot.
Garnish with fresh parsley or basil, if desired.
